key: Determines the maximum runspeed of the entity. Default is 10
note: инспекторский тултип разработчика, в игру не попадает

key: Determines how high and quick the entity jumps. Default is 100
How fast the pounce flip animation plays. Make higher for characters with lower jump height.
Shown in swap menu
note: инспекторский тултип разработчика (описание поля), не отображается игроку

key: Determines what the entity is currently doing. Default is Idle.
The current amount of health this entity has. Also sets the maximum amount of health.
Health regained per second.
Determines if the entity can pick up and use any weapons. Animals should have this turned off.
If true, the entity will cap its max speed at 0.4x the normal max.
Usually the head of the body. Used in calculating if the entity sees something.
If the entity's health drops below this point, they will enter the dying state.
The current ragdoll state this entity is in.
Determines if the entity is holding onto a ledge. DO NOT CHANGE THIS VALUE!
Self explanatory. You should use IsConsc() instead of isAlive for most things.
Entities with the same team will not be able to shoot eachother.
Determines if the entity can scream in pain.
All the noises the entity makes when shot, etc.
All the noises the entity makes when dying / getting downed.
Goes from -10 to 30. Determines the amount of oxygen the creature has. When below 0, the creature dies quickly.
These gameObjects will be destroyed when the entity dies.
if false, falling crates wont damage the entity
The animator that controls the animation limbs. Should be on the gameobject called "AnimLimbs".
The animator that controls the hand animation limbs. Should be on the gameobject called "Arms" that is a child of "AnimLimbs".
The transform that the actual arms are in. Should be the gameobject called "Arms" that is a child of "Limbs".
The BodyAnimator ClimbAnimation name. Just go to that animator's animator tab to check the name.
Shows the rigidbody the entity is standing on. Used in calculations and debugging.
If the entity is facing right, it's set to true. If it's facing left, it's set to false.
Should be set to true on characters currently controlled by the player (not teammates).
